falsification_conditions.condition: The price closes above the 200-day moving average by 5% or more
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear breakout above a major trendline would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal by confirming a bullish trend, contradicting the consolidation pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume exceeds 200% of the 30-day average daily volume
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a surge in volume would indicate a strong market shift, invalidating the 'HOLD' by signaling a breakout or breakdown in price direction.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score rises above 50 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 50 would indicate extreme volatility or a reversal, directly contradicting the current 'HOLD' and suggesting a trend has formed.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
